name: Manicotti (Ceideburg)
recipeIngredient: 8 Manicotti noodles, cooked 8 minutes and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat and garlic in skillet. Drain fat.
2. Blend next 4 ingredients (creamed cottage cheese, shredded mozzarella cheese, salt, and mayonnaise) in a bowl, stirring in the meat.
3. Fill each manicotti with the prepared mixture.
4. Place the filled manicotti in a single layer in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Sprinkle any remaining filling over the manicotti.
6. Cover with spaghetti sauce.
7. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes.
10. Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10 to 15 minutes, or until bubbly.
11. Serve hot, topped with any remaining Parmesan cheese.
